steps.title:
Welcome to

Rates
steps.content:
Let's take a quick tour.

Use the arrow keys or click next to continue.

steps.title: Find everything you need!
steps.content:
This is the main menu.

Here you'll find all the tools you need to operate everything related to the effective asminisitration of tariffs and the consultation of availabilities.

steps.title: Tools, tools, tools!
steps.content:
This is the main area of operations.

Everything you want to add, edit, or delete, is right here. Feel free to explore different functionalities, and when in doubt, just click the button.

steps.title: Straight to action!
steps.content:
Filter, sort, view, export, add...

Finding what you need in vast amounts of data can sometimes feel like looking for a needle in a haystack.
Thankfully we have a wide range of options to display exactly what you came to see.
